steps.title: Use the y-intercept
steps.content: The line contains $(0,4)$, so the y-intercept is $4$. In $f(x)=mx+b$, this means $b=4$.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: C is correct. It passes both point checks: $f(0)=4$ gives the intercept, and $f(6)=34$ confirms the slope calculation.
